author: @pulesjet
text: Building Metal Detector coils  ( for Gold and coins ) we use shielding within the coil housing in order to mitigate RFI and Capacitance between the Earth and the coil.   Thinking your Conductive ink may just be the trick.  How well does it apply to Plastic ?  Does it bead up  much ?   How does one get to your store ?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text:
here's the link mate

it applies well to plastic

author: @jasonwitt8619
text: WOW, those look like works of art that came right out of Tesla's basement. They look just like something that would had been made in the late 1800's or early 1900's, wonderful works of art that are built for a purpose. Would be cool to use some Neo's with a Halbach Array on it as well, just because we can, LOL

replies.author: @jasonwitt8619
replies.text: Me, well I have been working on a wood stop block built from scratch. I first smelted a large aluminum block then cut it with the band saw into a shape that will rest on the saw guide. A lot of work mate. I have did a custom job on this radial arm saw from start to finish. I even heat treated and graphened the rail that the bearings ride on. I have been working on this thing for weeks now on my free time. But, I'm getting there. I even added a router into the  same table. A all in one type of unit and very well built.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: an excellent reason for doing anything mate lol

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: did you do a vid mate? I would love to see

replies.author: @jasonwitt8619
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkering I'll more than likely do a video on the whole table after I have completed the whole project and explain what I did as I show it.

author: @markhodgson2348
text:
Awesome rob 
They shall make an ark of acacia wood," God commanded Moses in the Book of Exodus, after delivering the Israelites from slavery in Egypt. And so the Israelites built an ark, or chest, gilding it inside and out. And into this chest Moses placed stone tablets inscribed with the Ten Commandments, as given to him on Mount Sinai.
Thus the ark “was worshipped by the Israelites as the embodiment of God Himself,” writes Graham Hancock in The Sign and the Seal. "Biblical and other archaic sources speak of the Ark blazing with fire

author: @Scott_C
text: Great build.  Can you dip the wood in polyurethane to keep the look but still be insulted?

replies.author: @freundlicherhater6085
replies.text: Should work, but I would not trust it. If you want the wooden look I would make the handle from a solid piece of plastic or firm rubber and cover it with a layer of wood veneer. That way you can be sure it is well insulated. But if you want someone to be insulted you don't need polyurethane, just tell them to go f*ck themself.

replies.author: @-robo-
replies.text: You might try using a plastic layer between the metal and wood.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I suppose so - but maybe glass them over?

replies.author: @Scott_C
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkering Good point. Maybe clear resin would be a good idea to keep the look of wood and still be insulated.

replies.author: @Scott_C
replies.text: @freundlicherhater6085 😆
